author: edgl_dev
content:
pushing a fix but if u want a working peering config try this <@808969530608451584> :

```yaml
participants:
  - el_type: ethrex
    el_image: ethpandaops/ethrex:glamsterdam-devnet-6
    cl_type: lodestar
    cl_image: ethpandaops/lodestar:glamsterdam-devnet-6
    count: 2
    el_extra_params:
      - "--nat.extip=KURTOSIS_IP_ADDR_PLACEHOLDER"
      - "--http.api=eth,net,web3,admin,txpool,debug"
  - el_type: ethrex
    el_image: ethpandaops/ethrex:glamsterdam-devnet-6
    cl_type: teku
    cl_image: ethpandaops/teku:glamsterdam-devnet-6
    count: 2
    el_extra_params:
      - "--nat.extip=KURTOSIS_IP_ADDR_PLACEHOLDER"
      - "--http.api=eth,net,web3,admin,txpool,debug"

network_params:
  gloas_fork_epoch: 1
  preset: mainnet
  seconds_per_slot: 6
  gas_limit: 150000000

mev_type: buildoor
additional_services:
  - dora
  - spamoor
  - assertoor
buildoor_params:
  image: ethpandaops/buildoor:glamsterdam-devnet-6
  builder_api: false
  epbs_builder: true
  extra_args:
    - --lifecycle
spamoor_params:
  image: ethpandaops/spamoor:master
  spammers:
    - scenario: eoatx
      config:
        throughput: 2
dora_params:
  image: ethpandaops/dora:glamsterdam-devnet-6
assertoor_params:
  image: ethpandaops/assertoor:glamsterdam-devnet-6
  run_stability_check: false
  run_block_proposal_check: false
  tests:
    - { file: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ethpandaops/assertoor/refs/heads/glamsterdam-devnet-6/playbooks/gloas-dev/builder-lifecycle.yaml", config: { builderCount: 2 } }
```
